more.title: Ghana becomes latest African country to reject a US health deal, citing data sharing concerns
more.description: ACCRA, Ghana — Ghana has rejected a proposed health deal with the United States over concerns about data privacy and is now seeking a new agreement, an official said Friday. It was the latest African country to walk away from the deal over similar concerns. The deal included provisions that would have allowed U.S. entities [...] The post Ghana becomes latest African country to reject a US health deal, citing data sharing concerns appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: SA President Ramaphosa sneaks into Zimbabwe on private visit to Mnangagwa’s Precabe farm
more.description: SOUTH African President Cyril Ramaphosa this Sunday jetted into Zimbabwe on a private visit to President Emmerson Mnangagwa’s farm in Kwekwe, Midlands province. Pictures of Ramaphosa, his Zimbabwean counterpart, President Emmerson Mnangagwa, and the country’s top businessmen were awash on social media courtesy of the ruling Zanu PF party’s social media influencers. Ramaphosa’s visit coincided [...] The post SA President Ramaphosa sneaks into Zimbabwe on private visit to Mnangagwa’s Precabe farm appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com .

more.title: Two perish in accident after lorry ferrying church goers rams into stationary truck
more.description: TWO people died Friday evening when a lorry ferrying a group of 15 church congregants rammed onto the back of a broken-down haulage truck along the Chivhu-Nyazura road. more.title: Ramaphosa’s Visit Fuels Speculation Over ANC Succession, Links to Shaddy Zimbabwe’s Political-Business Networks
more.description: KWEKWE — South Africa’s ANC succession dynamics appear increasingly entangled with the complex political webs long associated with ZANU-PF in Zimbabwe. It is widely believed that President Cyril Ramaphosa favours his brother-in-law, Patrice Motsepe, as a potential successor—an assertion that has gained traction following Motsepe’s recent and somewhat curious CAF-related visit to Zimbabwe. more.title: Teens embrace social media and influencers for news but remain skeptical
more.description: NEW YORK — Teenagers are more inclined than their elders to get news from nontraditional sources such as social media and influencers, heralding a generational shift in how people seek out information. A national study by the Media Insight Project finds 36% of U.S. adults say they get news from social media at least once [...] The post Teens embrace social media and influencers for news but remain skeptical appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: Fugees rapper Pras reports to prison to begin 14-year sentence
more.description: SAFFORD, Ariz — Grammy-winning rapper Prakazrel “Pras” Michel of the Fugees has reported to federal prison to begin a 14-year sentence following a conviction over illegally funneling millions of dollars in foreign contributions to former President Barack Obama’s 2012 reelection campaign. Michel reported to prison Thursday, a spokesperson said, with federal records listing him as [...] The post Fugees rapper Pras reports to prison to begin 14-year sentence appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: Shakira thrills a crowd of 2 million with free concert on Brazil’s Copacabana beach
more.description: RIO DE JANEIRO — Colombian superstar Shakira gave a free concert on Copacabana Beach in Rio de Janeiro on Saturday night, an event that the city’s mayor said drew 2 million people to one of the world’s most iconic waterfronts. more.title: Kimi Antonelli wins the Miami Grand Prix for his third straight F1 victory
more.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla.— Kimi Antonelli made history as the first driver to win his first three Formula 1 races from the pole when the 19-year-old Mercedes driver won the Miami Grand Prix on Sunday. It was the third consecutive victory for Antonelli, the current points leader who is proving early this season to be a [...] The post Kimi Antonelli wins the Miami Grand Prix for his third straight F1 victory appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: Man United beats Liverpool 3-2 and will be back in the Champions League after 2-year absence
more.description: MANCHESTER, England — Manchester United is headed back to the Champions League. A 3-2 win against Liverpool on Sunday confirmed United’s return to European club soccer’s top competition after a two-year absence. more.title: Inter Milan seals the Italian league title with 3 rounds to spare
more.description: MILAN — Inter Milan sealed the Italian league soccer title with a 2-0 victory over visiting Parma on Sunday. Inter, which needed only a draw to secure the trophy, moved an unassailable 12 points clear of 2025 champion Napoli with three rounds remaining. It’s Inter’s 21st Serie A title, trailing only the record 36 held [...] The post Inter Milan seals the Italian league title with 3 rounds to spare appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: Man United great Alex Ferguson taken to hospital after feeling unwell at Old Trafford
more.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Manchester United great Alex Ferguson was taken to the hospital after feeling unwell ahead of his former team’s Premier League game against Liverpool on Sunday. The iconic former United manager was at Old Trafford for the match, but left before kickoff. A person with knowledge of the situation said the 84-year-old [...] The post Man United great Alex Ferguson taken to hospital after feeling unwell at Old Trafford appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .
